title: penstemon cardinalis var. regalis
intro: Penstemon cardinalis var. regalis, also known as the Desert Cardinal, is a variety of the Penstemon cardinalis plant, which is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The Desert Cardinal has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. The Desert Cardinal can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
